items.upstream_content:
{
  "name": "codemaker-webui",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "dev:coverage": "cross-env ENABLE_COVERAGE=true vite",
    "build": "tsc && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' vite build",
    "lint": "eslint src --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "prettier": "prettier --write src/"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@chakra-ui/icons": "^2.0.19",
    "@chakra-ui/react": "^2.7.1",
    "@dep305/codemaker-web-coverage-plugin-vite": "^0.1.17",
    "@dep305/codemaker-web-tools": "^1.1.9",
    "@emotion/react": "^11.11.1",
    "@emotion/styled": "^11.11.0",
    "@floating-ui/react": "^0.26.3",
    "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.21.1",
    "@opentelemetry/api": "^1.9.0",
    "@opentelemetry/context-zone": "^2.5.0",
    "@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http": "^0.211.0",
    "@opentelemetry/resources": "^2.5.0",
    "@opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base": "^2.5.0",
    "@opentelemetry/sdk-trace-web": "^2.5.0",
    "@opentelemetry/semantic-conventions": "^1.39.0",
    "@panzoom/panzoom": "^4.6.0",
    "@traceloop/ai-semantic-conventions": "^0.22.5",
    "@types/lodash": "^4.14.201",
    "@types/plantuml-encoder": "^1.4.2",
    "@types/react-window": "^1.8.8",
    "@uselessdev/datepicker": "^2.7.0",
    "axios": "^1.4.0",
    "chakra-react-select": "^4.7.0",
    "clsx": "^2.0.0",
    "cross-env": "^7.0.3",
    "crypto-js": "^4.2.0",
    "date-fns": "^3.3.1",
    "diff": "^5.2.0",
    "eventsource-parser": "^1.0.0",
    "formik": "^2.4.5",
    "framer-motion": "^10.12.18",
    "immer": "^10.0.2",
    "jsonrepair": "^3.13.0",
    "lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "markdown-it": "^14.1.0",
    "mermaid": "^10.9.1",
    "minimatch": "^10.0.1",
    "minisearch": "^7.2.0",
    "moment": "^2.29.4",
    "nanoid": "^4.0.2",
    "rc-tree": "^5.13.1",
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "react-icons": "^4.11.0",
    "react-joyride": "^2.9.3",
    "react-markdown": "^8.0.7",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.14.1",
    "react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.0",
    "react-virtualized-auto-sizer": "^1.0.24",
    "react-window": "^1.8.10",
    "react-zoom-pan-pinch": "^3.5.1",
    "rehype-katex": "^6.0.3",
    "remark-gfm": "^3.0.1",
    "remark-math": "^5.1.1",
    "simplebar-react": "^3.2.6",
    "swr": "^2.2.2",
    "tailwind-merge": "3.3.1",
    "tiktoken": "^1.0.22",
    "web-vitals": "^3.5.2",
    "yup": "^1.3.2",
    "zod": "^3.23.8",
    "zustand": "^4.3.9"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/crypto-js": "^4.2.2",
    "@types/diff": "^5.2.3",
    "@types/react": "^18.2.14",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.6",
    "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.7",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^5.61.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^5.61.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react-swc": "^3.3.2",
    "@welldone-software/why-did-you-render": "^8",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.14",
    "eslint": "^8.44.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^4.6.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.3",
    "husky": "^9.1.7",
    "postcss": "^8.4.25",
    "prettier": "^3.0.0",
    "sass": "^1.63.6",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.3.2",
    "typescript": "^5.1.6",
    "vite": "^4.4.2",
    "vite-plugin-compression": "^0.5.1",
    "vite-plugin-top-level-await": "^1.6.0",
    "vite-plugin-wasm": "^3.5.0"
  },
  "volta": {
    "node": "18.20.5",
    "pnpm": "6.35.1"
  }
}

diff --git a/src/routes/CodeChat/ChatFunctionalToolbar.tsx b/src/routes/CodeChat/ChatFunctionalToolbar.tsx
index 2229f5af..e47c62c0 100644
--- a/src/routes/CodeChat/ChatFunctionalToolbar.tsx
+++ b/src/routes/CodeChat/ChatFunctionalToolbar.tsx
@@ -300,6 +300,8 @@ function ChatFunctionalToolbar({ disabled = false }: { disabled?: boolean }) {
       title: 'Memory 工具',
       icon: <LuMessageSquareTextIcon w="16px" h="16px" color="white" />,
       value: compressConfig.enable,
+      lebalTooltips:
+        '当上下文窗口占用达到100%时，自动进行内容压缩生成memory，增强仓库智聊对上下文的记忆能力',
       onChange: (val) => {
         setCompressConfig({ enable: val });
       },
@@ -323,7 +325,7 @@ function ChatFunctionalToolbar({ disabled = false }: { disabled?: boolean }) {
 
   return (
     <Box ref={popoverRef} data-tour="chat-functional-toolbar">
-      <Popover placement="top" isOpen={isOpen}>
+      <Popover placement="top" isOpen={isOpen} isLazy lazyBehavior="unmount">
         <PopoverTrigger>
           <MiniButton
             // size="sm"
@@ -352,7 +354,7 @@ function ChatFunctionalToolbar({ disabled = false }: { disabled?: boolean }) {
             </Tooltip>
           </MiniButton>
         </PopoverTrigger>
-        <PopoverContent w={'330px'} ref={popoverContentRef}>
+        <PopoverContent w={'330px'} ref={popoverContentRef} maxH="80vh" display="flex" flexDirection="column">
           <PopoverHeader
             display="flex"
             justifyContent="space-between"
@@ -362,14 +364,21 @@ function ChatFunctionalToolbar({ disabled = false }: { disabled?: boolean }) {
             _dark={{ borderColor: 'gray.600' }}
             py={2}
             px={3}
+            flexShrink={0}
           >
             <Text fontSize="13px" fontWeight="medium">
               工具配置
             </Text>
             <CloseButton size="sm" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} />
           </PopoverHeader>
-          <PopoverBody display="flex" flexDirection="column" p="2">
-            <VStack flex={1} align="stretch" py={1}>
+          <Box
+            className="show-scrollbar"
+            flex="1"
+            minH="0"
+            overflowY="auto"
+          >
+            <PopoverBody display="flex" flexDirection="column" p="2">
+              <VStack align="stretch" py={1}>
               {renderSwitchItem({
                 title: '仓库文件读取',
                 icon: <FiFileText size={16} />,
@@ -506,6 +515,7 @@ function ChatFunctionalToolbar({ disabled = false }: { disabled?: boolean }) {
               <MCPConfigCollapse setMcpSettingOpen={setMcpSettingOpen} />
             </VStack>
           </PopoverBody>
+          </Box>
         </PopoverContent>
       </Popover>
       {/* 注入组件 */}

items.reason: Y3不需要模型选择功能，固定使用VSCode Settings中的模型配置

items.diff:
diff --git a/src/store/workspace/tools/read.ts b/src/store/workspace/tools/read.ts
index 4f6974c9..938875bb 100644
--- a/src/store/workspace/tools/read.ts
+++ b/src/store/workspace/tools/read.ts
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 import { diffLines } from "diff";
 import { useChatConfig } from "../../chat-config";
 import { ParseImgType } from "../../../services/chatModel";
+import { IDE, useExtensionStore } from "../../extension";
 
 /**
  * 读取文件Tool
@@ -39,8 +40,9 @@ export const getV2ReadFileTool = (data: IReadFileToolParams) => {
   const { hasCodeTable } = data;
   const chatModels = useChatConfig.getState().chatModels
   const selectedModel = useChatConfig.getState().config.model
+  const isVscode = useExtensionStore.getState().IDE === IDE.VisualStudio
 
-  const isSupportImage = chatModels[selectedModel]?.parseImgType === ParseImgType.BASE64
+  const isSupportImage = chatModels[selectedModel]?.parseImgType === ParseImgType.BASE64 && isVscode
   let description = hasCodeTable
     ? `Reads a file from the local filesystem. You can access any file directly by using this tool.
Assume this tool is able to read all files on the machine. If the User provides a path to a file assume that path is valid. It is okay to read a file that does not exist; an error will be returned.

Usage:
- The file_path parameter must be an absolute path, not a relative path
- By default, it reads up to ${exceedsMaxLines} lines starting from the beginning of the file
- You can optionally specify a line offset and limit (especially handy for long files), but it's recommended to read the whole file by not providing these parameters
- Any lines longer than ${exceedsMaxLines} characters will be truncated
- Results are returned using cat -n format, with line numbers starting at 1
- You have the capability to call multiple tools in a single response. It is always better to speculatively read multiple files as a batch that are potentially useful. 
- If you read a file that exists but has empty contents you will receive a system reminder warning in place of file contents.
- You can use this tool at most twice in the same round of questioning.
- If both attempts at read_file don't find highly relevant code, please use the retrieve_code tool`
     : `Reads a file from the local filesystem. You can access any file directly by using this tool.
Assume this tool is able to read all files on the machine. If the User provides a path to a file assume that path is valid. It is okay to read a file that does not exist; an error will be returned.

Usage:
- The file_path parameter must be an absolute path, not a relative path
- By default, it reads up to ${exceedsMaxLines} lines starting from the beginning of the file
- You can optionally specify a line offset and limit (especially handy for long files), but it's recommended to read the whole file by not providing these parameters
- Any lines longer than ${exceedsMaxLines} characters will be truncated
- Results are returned using cat -n format, with line numbers starting at 1
- You have the capability to call multiple tools in a single response. It is always better to speculatively read multiple files as a batch that are potentially useful. 
- If you read a file that exists but has empty contents you will receive a system reminder warning in place of file contents.
- You can use this tool at most twice in the same round of questioning.`
@@ -142,11 +144,12 @@ export const getV2ReadFileToolZHTool = (data: IReadFileToolParams) => {
   const { hasCodeTable } = data;
   const chatModels = useChatConfig.getState().chatModels
   const selectedModel = useChatConfig.getState().config.model
+  const isVscode = useExtensionStore.getState().IDE === IDE.VisualStudio
 
   let description = hasCodeTable
     ? "从本地文件系统读取文件。您可以通过此工具直接访问任何文件。
假设此工具能够读取计算机上的所有文件。如果用户提供了文件路径，请假设该路径是有效的。读取不存在的文件是可以的；系统将返回错误。

使用说明：
- file_path 参数必须是绝对路径，而非相对路径
- 默认情况下，从文件开头开始读取，最多读取 ${exceedsMaxLines} 行
- 您可以选择指定行偏移量和限制（对于长文件特别有用），但建议不提供这些参数以读取整个文件
- 任何超过 ${exceedsMaxLines} 个字符的行将被截断
- 结果以 cat -n 格式返回，行号从 1 开始
- 您能够在单次响应中调用多个工具。最好将可能相关的多个文件批量读取
- 如果您读取存在但内容为空的文件，将在文件内容位置收到系统提醒警告
- 在同一轮提问中，此工具最多可使用两次
- 如果两次 read_file 尝试均未找到高度相关的代码，请使用 retrieve_code 工具"
     : "从本地文件系统读取文件。您可以通过此工具直接访问任何文件。
假设此工具能够读取计算机上的所有文件。如果用户提供了文件路径，请假设该路径是有效的。读取不存在的文件是可以的；系统将返回错误。

使用说明：
- file_path 参数必须是绝对路径，而非相对路径
- 默认情况下，从文件开头开始读取，最多读取 ${exceedsMaxLines} 行
- 您可以选择指定行偏移量和限制（对于长文件特别有用），但建议不提供这些参数以读取整个文件
- 任何超过 ${exceedsMaxLines} 个字符的行将被截断
- 结果以 cat -n 格式返回，行号从 1 开始
- 您能够在单次响应中调用多个工具。最好将可能相关的多个文件批量读取
- 如果您读取存在但内容为空的文件，将在文件内容位置收到系统提醒警告
- 在同一轮提问中，此工具最多可使用两次"
-  const isSupportImage = chatModels[selectedModel]?.parseImgType === ParseImgType.BASE64
+  const isSupportImage = chatModels[selectedModel]?.parseImgType === ParseImgType.BASE64 && isVscode
 
   if (isSupportImage) {
     description += `此工具还可调用适当的路径读取图像文件。支持的图像格式：jpeg/jpg、png、gif、webp。`
